name: apxUSD
redeem: General users can exit through secondary markets and liquidity pools. Protocol mint/redemption is for eligible whitelisted participants in permitted jurisdictions; redemptions settle in USDC, not preferred shares, and liquidity may be more limited outside traditional trading hours and weekends.
notes: Synthetic dollar backed by offchain DAT preferred shares. Clear official docs and DefiLlama coverage, but redemption is permissioned and backing depends on offchain credit/equity assets; token contract is upgradeable with pause and denylist controls.
